🚨 Comment Mention Regression Prevention Test

TEST INSTRUCTIONS:
  1. Type @ in each textarea below
  2. Look for the yellow "EMERGENCY DEBUG" dropdown to appear
  3. Working contexts should show the dropdown immediately
  4. Broken contexts will not show any dropdown

✅ BASELINE WORKING: PostCreator Pattern

(Expected: WORKING)
Pattern: Direct MentionInput with clean layout hierarchy
Waiting for @ input...

✅ BASELINE WORKING: QuickPost Pattern

(Expected: WORKING)
Pattern: Direct MentionInput with minimal wrapper
Waiting for @ input...

❌ REGRESSION TARGET: CommentForm Pattern

(Currently: BROKEN - Must Fix)
Pattern: MentionInput in CommentForm with complex form layout
Waiting for @ input...

❌ REGRESSION TARGET: Reply Form Pattern

(Currently: BROKEN - Must Fix)
Pattern: MentionInput in reply form context
Waiting for @ input...
Keyboard Shortcuts:
  • Ctrl+T - Auto-test all inputs with @test
  • Ctrl+R - Reset all tests
Expected Results:
  • ✅ PostCreator and QuickPost should show dropdowns (currently working)
  • ❌ CommentForm and Reply should show dropdowns but currently don't (regression)
  • All dropdowns should have identical debug format and agent suggestions
